theScene: You step past the threshold of the building and glance around at the items on display, only to jump as you suddenly notice the dour looking woman glaring contemptuously at you from behind a counter with her arms crossed.
She raises her chin ever so slightly as she quickly gives your body a once-over before continuing to piercingly gaze into your eyes.
Hmph. You're a new face in town.

Her cold gaze and flat, borderline hostile voice sends an involuntary shiver racing down your spine as a long silence fills the air, and the tension starts to get so unbearable that you finally speak up to introduce yourself.
Um, hello, my name is [ThePlayerName]. I'm a new adventurer in town and-
She cuts you off with an almost contemptuous wave of her hand and an arch of one of her silver brows.

Spare me your life story, [ThePlayerName]. You're an adventurer, and that tells me everything I need to know about you. Besides, by the look of you, I get the feeling that you're not going to last very long out there anyway.
You blink in confusion at her words as she takes another, slower look at your body, and you can keenly feel her gaze as it trails down your chest.
Her gaze stops moving as it focuses on your groin for a long moment before she looks back up at you again with the faintest hint of a smirk on her face.
I mean that you look as much of a pervert as the last twenty adventurers who waltzed into this store, if not more so. I'm sure those elves out in the forest are going to eat you {i}alive{/i}.
Wha- How do I look like a pervert!?
Her smile widens ever so slightly as she leans forwards towards you with a grim look of amusement clearly evident on her face.

You want me to spell it out for you, [ThePlayerName]? {i}Anyone{/i} planning to go adventuring on this continent is a pervert. The only difference is how big of a perv they are, and trust me when I say I've had a lot of experience identifying these kinds of traits in people.
After taking a moment to keenly watch your discomfort, Amber's expression becomes flat once more as her voice resumes its flat, chilly tone while she gestures with one hand around the store.
But luckily for you, I only sell my goods to perverts, and I've got quite the stock here.

Her detached, almost bored voice makes you hesitate momentarily as you have a hard time determining how much of what she said was just deadpan jokes or if she's entirely serious, but you have a sneaking suspicion that she's said nothing but the truth...
Shaking your head, you return your attention to Amber as she continues to stare at you for a few seconds longer before she blinks and glances around her shop.

If you don't want to end up some monster girl's boy toy, be sure to stock up on my wares. If this'll be your first time out, I'd recommend getting some anaph herbs, and you should pick up some runes and equipment if they catch your eye and you've got money to spare. Eros are worthless if you don't spend it.
She falls silent for a moment before she seems to remember something and speaks up again, almost in afterthought.
Oh, and don't forget to actually equip any gear you buy. It won't help you any if you're not using it. Also, if you break anything in the store, you buy it.

(To equip items, right click, press Esc, or use the quick bar at the top of the screen to go to the menu, then click the equipment tab. From there, you can click any item you want to equip or unequip.)
(Additionally, you can use consumable items in your inventory when you can access it. Just click the item you want to use. This also applies to some skills when out of combat.)
As you walk further into the store and approach Amber, her eyes abruptly snap to your face as her dour expression shifts into a tiny smirk.
So. I hear you {i}actually{/i} managed to get the first sigil.
She crosses her arms as her lips twist back into their customary scowl..
I thought you would end up eloping with some elven whore by now. But maybe I was wrong about you. Maybe you aren't like the other adventurers I've met.
Amber lets out a mirthless chuckle as she leans towards ever so slightly.
Perhaps you're an even {i}bigger{/i} pervert than my usual clientele, one who just wants to fully experience each and every kind of depraved, erotic monster on this continent, or am I wrong?
'I'm trying to stop the Demon Queen!'
'I just want to get out of debt!'

EventText.NameOfScene: 'I'm trying to stop the Demon Queen!'
theScene: Amber slowly blinks before gently raising an eyebrow at your statement.
Without ever taking her eyes off of yours, Amber lets out another humorless laugh with a tiny smile utterly devoid of any positivity whatsoever.
I'll be looking forward to the day when you run into some monster so sinfully lascivious that those innocent ideals of yours start to melt away. Good luck out there.
She stares you down until you can't manage to maintain eye contact with her anymore, and she lets out a final chuckle before her expression slides back to its usual flat, uninterested look.
Whatever your reason for adventuring is, don't forget to restock on supplies and gear here. If you aren't prepared for what's to come, you're doing yourself a disservice.

EventText.NameOfScene: 'I just want to get out of debt!'
theScene: Amber's gaze sharpens intensely as her lips slowly curve into a deep, unsettling smile.

Without another word, Amber calculatingly gives you a once-over, making you feel uncomfortably like you're an object on display as she takes several long moments to appraise you before she returns her still piercing eyes to your face.
Yes, I can understand the allure of money, [ThePlayerName]. And it is powerful indeed. Just be sure to spend some of it here first, after all, you have to spend money to make money.♪
Her face slowly slides back into her customary scowl after a few long seconds, but you're left feeling more than a little uneasy in the aftermath of her unnerving grin.

Of course, if it's just the debt you're worried about and you're not interested in making a fortune, you could always just find some monster girl to settle down with and never come back, you know. I'm sure there are plenty of gals who are more than willing to help you out with that strategy.
Amber blinks as she stares at you momentarily, seemingly shocked by your blunt answer, but she quickly lets out a low laugh as a faintly twisted grin slowly blossoms on her face.
I knew from the moment I saw you that you were a pervert, [ThePlayerName]. I just didn't think you'd admit to it so willingly.
She glances from one side to the other as if to check if anyone else is listening in before smiling back at you.
But from one pervert to another, you should be careful with how much faith you put in that recall stone of yours. It can only do so much if you're letting yourself drown in pleasure out there.
Her lips curve back into their customary scowl as her expression abruptly darkens with a small sigh.
And I would {i}hate{/i} to lose a customer.
As your conversation winds down, you start to browse Amber's store, but your attention is quickly brought back to her as she speaks up with a tiny smirk on her face.
Ah, right. Before I forget, I should let you know that because you cleared the Forest Dungeon, you're allowed to buy a few new items from my store. Be sure to check them out.
She gestures to a nearby shelf, with items on it that prior she refused to even consider selling to you.

Whenever you're able to reach a new location, I should have at least a few new items to sell you, so keep that in mind. Some of them may even be vital to surviving in that new environment, but you can always go without them if you want to truly experience {i}everything{/i} on offer there...
Amber chuckles to herself for a moment before her face slips into a scowl.
Amber glances up as you walk into her store, and she smirks as she recognizes you.
So. You managed to scale your way all the way up that mountain, huh? Nice job. I figured a group of harpies or a minotaur would have hauled you off halfway up, but you made it in one piece.
And I guess you made it past Nara as well. I figured she would have managed to 'distract' you longer.
You blink in surprise at how nonchalantly she mentioned Nara as a small hint of suspicion worms its way into your mind.
Hold on, you knew about her plans to ambush me?
She gives you a flat look as the smile slips off of her face.

What, you think I'm the one who sent her? Think again. She's the one who let it slip. She shops here like all the other adventurers, and she's a little too chatty to keep things to herself, so I found out almost instantly. Nara can't keep a secret to save her life...
Instantly, her expression hardens as her voice becomes flinty.
I don't play favorites with customers.
A silence fills the air as she glares at you to make her point before her face softens back to its usual scowl.
And even if I did tell you, what difference would it have made? You were going to have to beat her once you made it up there anyway.
An unsettling and uncharacteristic smile spreads over Amber's face for a moment.
At any rate, I'm sure the two of you had plenty of 'fun' up there on that mountain top. And who am I to spoil a surprise like that?
A hint of irritation clouds her expression for a moment as her smile falls away before letting out a deep sigh.
I'm sure Nara will tell me {i}all{/i} about it when she stops in again...
There's a long lull in the conversation as Amber falls quiet for a few moments, mulling over the dancer.
But before you can really come to a conclusion on that, Amber breaks you out of your thoughts as she suddenly speaks up again in a curt, almost disinterested tone.

Oh, right. You already know the drill about new items from reaching new areas, but a word of advice before you head into the Temple on the mountain. You should probably get some conscio powder, you're going to need it.
Her lips curve up into a tiny smirk.
That is, unless you want to end up hopelessly entranced by all manner of monsters who are waiting for hapless adventurers just like you.
Amber glances up as you walk into her store, and she flashes you a smirk as she places a small potion down on a counter before turning all of her attention to you.
Hmph. I'm a little impressed. I figured you would have given up at the Temple, but here you are. You're not actually doing too bad out there... For a pervert.
She lets out a small chuckle as her smile almost imperceptibly deepens.
But what do I know? I'm just glad that you're turning out to be a nice and reliable customer.
Amber straightens as her expression becomes almost deadly serious, washing all of the humor out of her face in a heartbeat as she leans towards you.
But if you're going to keep pressing forward, that means you're heading into the caverns, and that place is no joke.

Lots of creatures live in the dark down there, and they're known to have some nasty paralytic powers, amongst other things. I would highly recommend getting yourself some anti-paralysis gear, some fairy dust, and maybe a few panaceas unless you {i}want{/i} to end up completely immobilized and drained utterly dry.
After taking a few moments to stare you down to drive her message home, she gives you a curt nod before slouching back into her normal posture with a shrug and a sly grin.
Of course, you could always employ the tried and tested method of simply running away from everything until you make it all the way to the Labyrinth. That works too.
She falls silent momentarily as she tilts her head to one side, studying you with a smirk.

I've heard that some adventurers get too freaked out by the girls they meet in there and can't do anything {i}but{/i} run away from them. It's quite shameful. I wonder what {i}your{/i} reaction will be, [ThePlayerName].
Amber glances up as you walk into her store, lazily leaning against the counter her elbow set on it while her cheek rests on her palm, her lips curling into a smirk as she straightens her posture.
Heh, managed to get through the Labyrinth, I hear? Not bad! Most adventurers don't manage to get past it.
She lets out a tired sigh while her face slips into a wary frown.
Or they search for... {i}alternative{/i} ways past it.
The edge in her voice clearly hints at the inadvisability of such a prospect, all the while letting through some actual relief that you cleared the Umbral maze yourself.
But you managed to do it fair and square, so good job. Really, I mean it.
There's a relaxed smile on her lips as she studies you with some measure of fondness, before lazily gesturing to the rest of her store with one hand.
Just be sure to keep your inventory stocked, and don't forget to use your items! I'm sure by now you've realized the worth of being prepared in your perverted adventure?
As her arm falls back to her side, her gaze turns stern and serious.
...I know I keep saying this, but things {i}will{/i} only get harder from here, no shame in taking it easy before you venture into the Capital of monsters.
All kinds of sluts there who will eagerly milk you dry for days on end, in ways beyond the average person's imagination.
She lets out a mild chuckle and shrugs with a sly grin.
Or maybe that's what you steeled yourself for to get through the dark deadly Labyrinth? To meet more depraved monsters? Heh, not like I'm really one to judge.
She gives you another smile, the forthright expression looking almost out of place on her usually permafrowning face.
So, anyways, what can I do for my valued customer? Be sure to check my stock for new items, you might have missed something interesting.

With a hint of annoyance flickering across her face, the tension abruptly drains from Amber's body as she crosses her arms with a scoff.

Hmph. Figures. With how many satisfied customers I've had, you'd think someone {i}other{/i} than Vivian would have the balls to tell people about my 'secret' services. I guess they don't like flaunting their kinks for everyone to know.

Well, since the cat's out of the bag, I may as well tell you everything. While I supply normal sex toys in this store, I {i}also{/i} do custom orders for more {i}specific{/i} needs, for a price. I {i}try{/i} to keep mildly quiet about it to avoid getting flooded with too many requests.

However, I think we can make a deal. I can make some tweaks to your own 'weapons', if you want. It'll cost you, but it will be worth it. Just keep in mind that I can't upgrade holy relics, or anything {i}too{/i} unusual. I've got to know how things work to tweak them, and I'd prefer not to be a victim of divine retribution.
The smile slowly slides off of her face as her scowl returns, but her calculating gaze still remains locked on you as she studies your entire body for several long moments.
And who knows? Maybe you'll be able to help me out with the development of a few things yourself.

But there's my offer, [ThePlayerName]. Let me know if you're interested, and we can work out a deal. Just know that it'll be payment in something other than just Eros.

Prove yourself... Keep adventuring, buy my wares... {i}Show me{/i} that you're into what I've got to offer. Once I can have a better idea of the kind of guy you are, ask me again, and I'll tell you if you fit the bill.
